acceptance_scenarios: Operations API Minimal API routes are registered in Program.cs through MapOperationsRuntimeEndpoints.
Old Workspace/Card prepare and confirm routes remain reachable and call OperationsRuntimeService as compatibility wrappers.
Operations confirm records CommandSubmission evidence through the command submission store or equivalent.
Operations confirm returns commitStatus and projectionStatus to clients.
The same tenantId plus idempotencyKey and a different payloadHash returns 409 without a second business result.
API boundary guard rejects page-specific business write routes.
go_criteria: Confirm writes CommandSubmission or equivalent submission evidence.
Executable invariant runner evidence is present.
DB-backed shadow compare evidence is green.
no_go_criteria: P0: old API bypasses Operations service.
P0: Confirm has no submission evidence.
P0: same idempotencyKey different payload not 409.
P0: page-specific business write API accepted.
P0: executable invariant runner has failed blocking checks.
P0: DB-backed shadow compare is red.
known_risks: MR-02 uses compatibility adapter while old Workspace/Card API remains supported.
Business signoff is outside this automated technical gate and is still required for production promotion.
